Square: 4Q Earnings Snapshot

SAN FRANCISCO (AP) _ Square Inc. (SQ) on Tuesday reported fourth-quarter net income of $294 million.

The San Francisco-based company said it had net income of 59 cents per share. Earnings, adjusted for one-time gains and costs, were 32 cents per share.

The results surpassed Wall Street expectations. The average estimate of 14 analysts surveyed by Zacks Investment Research was for earnings of 23 cents per share.
